## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Backend/API contract exists or is not required.
- [ ] Frontend route/state is clear and scoped.
- [ ] Tests cover meaningful behavior.
- [ ] Browser QA covers happy, negative, out-of-order, and route recovery paths when UI changes.
- [ ] Docs and handoff are updated.
- [ ] PR links this issue.
